div1.entryFree:
Mixture, 1) a state of being mixed and confounded: when the planets in evil m. to disorder wander, Troil. I, 3, 95.
2) a powerful liquid composed of different ingredients: if this m. do not work, Rom. IV, 3, 21. thou m. rank, Hml. III, 2, 268. --s powerful o'er the blood, Oth. I, 3, 104.
